hero.subtitle:
Between light and shadow, I advance.
Inspired by Yoshihiro Togashi.

intro.title: Introduction
intro.text: In a vast and dangerous world, there are people who dedicate their lives to exploring the unknown. They face legendary beasts, unravel forbidden mysteries, and hunt treasures that few would dare seek. These people are known as Hunters.

footer.credits:
Conceptual project developed by Cayo B.Gomes.
Made for educational and portfolio purposes.
